title: Message/get rejects ids:null, violating RFC 8620 §5.1
description: Client sends Message/get with ids: null (JMAP standard way to request all objects) → daemon returns invalidArguments error instead of the complete message list. RFC 8620 §5.1 explicitly requires ids:null to return all objects of the type. The _ branch in the ids match in jmap.rs message_get() catches both null and absent ids and rejects them, breaking any JMAP client that follows the spec.
